name: Fresh Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the diced and seeded tomatoes, chopped cilantro, minced onions, fresh lime juice, seeded and minced jalapeno chile, and salt (to taste).
2. Mix all ingredients until well combined.
3. Serve about 1/4 cup per person. Makes approximately 1 cup total.
Total Prep Time: 10 minutes
